name: ALLSTATE CORP
summary: The Allstate Corporation, incorporated in Delaware in 1992, is one of the largest publicly held personal lines insurers in the United States. It offers auto, homeowners, and other personal lines insurance through exclusive agents, independent agents, and direct channels under the Allstate, National General, Direct Auto, and Answer Financial brands. Additional offerings include consumer product protection plans, roadside assistance, automotive protection products, identity protection, and mobility intelligence services using automotive telematics.
